p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ACCESS Alignment Request Result Codes v0.7.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 7 concepts

tr.td: Patient is eligible and has been aligned so the participant can now begin providing services to the patient under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "aligned", "display": "Aligned"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="aligned"><display value="Aligned"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not aligned - assigned to Control Group
The patient is technically eligible, but based on the randomized control group algorithm, the patient has been placed in the control group for 12 months and therefore cannot be aligned for 12 months.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-aligned-control-group", "display": "Not aligned - assigned to Control Group"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-aligned-control-group"><display value="Not aligned - assigned to Control Group"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not aligned - already aligned to another participant in the track

The patient is technically eligible, but is already aligned to another participant and receiving services under the ACCESS Model in the same track. A patient can only be aligned to one participant in each track. If a switch consent attestation is submitted, but the patient is still within the 3-month lock-in period, this response will be received.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-aligned-already-aligned", "display": "Not aligned - already aligned to another participant in the track"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-aligned-already-aligned"><display value="Not aligned - already aligned to another participant in the track"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The patient either is not enrolled in Medicare Part A and Part B or dual eligible for Medicare and Medicaid, or they do not have Medicare as their primary insurance, so they are not eligible for services under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-aligned-not-medicare", "display": "Not aligned - not receiving Medicare"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-aligned-not-medicare"><display value="Not aligned - not receiving Medicare"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not aligned - receiving services that prevent eligibility
The patient is receiving services (such as hospice, end stage renal disease (ESRD), etc.) making them ineligible to be part of the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-aligned-services", "display": "Not aligned - receiving services that prevent eligibility"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-aligned-services"><display value="Not aligned - receiving services that prevent eligibility"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The patient does not have a treating diagnosis that qualifies them for service in the track indicated and therefore cannot get services under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-aligned-diagnoses", "display": "Not aligned - no qualifying diagnosis"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-aligned-diagnoses"><display value="Not aligned - no qualifying diagnosis"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The request to switch the patient's alignment from a different participant after the 3-month lock in period is accepted and the patient is considered switched and now re-aligned.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "aligned-switch-approved", "display": "Aligned and switch approved"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSAlignmentResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="aligned-switch-approved"><display value="Aligned and switch approved"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: United States of America
Not aligned - assigned to Control Group
Not aligned - already aligned to another participant in the track
Not aligned - not receiving Medicare
Not aligned - receiving services that prevent eligibility
Not aligned - no qualifying diagnosis
Aligned and switch approved

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ACCESS Eligibility Result Codes v0.7.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 8 concepts

tr.td: Patient is eligible for services under the model. This response does not mean the patient has been aligned. It simply means the patient is eligible to be aligned.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "eligible", "display": "Eligible"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="eligible"><display value="Eligible"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Patient is provisionally eligible for services under the model depending on the diagnosis.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "eligible-pending-diagnosis", "display": "Eligible pending diagnosis"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="eligible-pending-diagnosis"><display value="Eligible pending diagnosis"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Patient is eligible to switch participants.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "eligible-switch-participants", "display": "Eligible to switch participants."}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="eligible-switch-participants"><display value="Eligible to switch participants."></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The patient either is not enrolled in Medicare Part A and Part B or dual eligible for Medicare and Medicaid, or they do not have Medicare as their primary insurance, so they are not eligible for services under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-eligible-not-medicare", "display": "Not eligible - not receiving Medicare"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-eligible-not-medicare"><display value="Not eligible - not receiving Medicare"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not eligible - receiving services that prevent eligibility
The patient is receiving services (such as hospice, end stage renal disease (ESRD), etc.) making them ineligible to be part of the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-eligible-services", "display": "Not eligible - receiving services that prevent eligibility"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-eligible-services"><display value="Not eligible - receiving services that prevent eligibility"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The patient does not have a treating diagnosis that qualifies them for services in the track indicated and therefore cannot get services under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-eligible-diagnoses", "display": "Not eligible - no qualifying diagnosis"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-eligible-diagnoses"><display value="Not eligible - no qualifying diagnosis"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not eligible - assigned to Control Group

The patient is technically eligible for the ACCESS Model, but based on the randomized control group algorithm, the patient has been placed in the control group for 12 months and therefore cannot be aligned for 12 months.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-eligible-control-group", "display": "Not eligible - assigned to Control Group"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-eligible-control-group"><display value="Not eligible - assigned to Control Group"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Not eligible - already aligned to another participant in the track

The patient is technically eligible, but is already aligned to another participant and receiving services under the ACCESS Model in the same track. A patient can only be aligned to one participant in each track.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "not-eligible-already-aligned", "display": "Not eligible - already aligned to another participant in the track"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEligibilityResultCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="not-eligible-already-aligned"><display value="Not eligible - already aligned to another participant in the track"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: United States of America
Eligible pending diagnosis
Eligible to switch participants.
Not eligible - not receiving Medicare
Not eligible - receiving services that prevent eligibility
Not eligible - no qualifying diagnosis
Not eligible - assigned to Control Group
Not eligible - already aligned to another participant in the track

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ACCESS Event Types v0.7.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 7 concepts

tr.td: The 3-month participant lock-in period is ending soon, allowing the patient to switch to a different participant if desired.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "participant-lock-ending", "display": "Participant Lock-In Period Ending"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="participant-lock-ending"><display value="Participant Lock-In Period Ending"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The 12-month control group assignment period is ending soon, allowing the patient to be aligned to a participant.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "control-group-ending", "display": "Control Group Period Ending"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="control-group-ending"><display value="Control Group Period Ending"></coding>

tr.td: The alignment period is ending and renewal action is required to continue services under the ACCESS Model.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "alignment-renewal", "display": "Alignment Renewal Due"}

button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Baseline data must be reported within 60 days of alignment. The baseline data is due soon. Please submit the baseline data for the patient.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS", "version": "0.7.0", "code": "baseline-reporting-window", "display": "Baseline Reporting Due"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://globalalliantinc.com/access/CodeSystem/ACCESSEventTypeCS"><version value="0.7.0"><code value="baseline-reporting-window"><display value="Baseline Reporting Due"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: The quarterly data report is due soon. Please submit the quarterly data for the patient.

tr.td: The end-of-year data report is due soon. Please submit the end-of-year data for the patient.
